creator: t-matubara@miracle.ocn.ne.jp
text:
Created attachment 223783
patch-sys_dev_rtwn_usb_rtwn_usb_attach.h & patch-sys_dev_usb_usbdev

To freebsd-wireless

<uname -a> is
13.0-STABLE FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #14 stable/13-n245082-eb008a6793db-dirty: Sat Apr  3 16:33:16 JST 2021

Please apply the patch to make WIFI(USB) recognized. 

Product:I-O DATA WN-AC433UM
Driver: RTL8821AU

</var/log/messages> is
 kernel: ugen0.2: <I-O DATA DEVICE, INC. WN-AC433UM> at usbus0
 kernel: rtwn0 on uhub1
 kernel: rtwn0: <WN-AC433UM> on usbus0
 kernel: rtwn0: MAC/BB RTL8821AU, RF 6052 1T1R

<ifconfig> is
wlan0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
	options=1<RXCSUM>
	ether XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX
	groups: wlan
	ssid XXXXXXXX channel XX (5220 MHz 11a ht/20) bssid XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX
	regdomain JAPAN country JP authmode WPA2/802.11i privacy ON
	deftxkey UNDEF AES-CCM 2:128-bit AES-CCM 3:128-bit txpower 23 bmiss 7
	mcastrate 6 mgmtrate 6 scanvalid 60 ht20 ampdulimit 64k ampdudensity 4
	shortgi -stbc ldpctx -ldpcrx -uapsd wme roaming MANUAL
	parent interface: rtwn0
	media: IEEE 802.11 Wireless Ethernet MCS mode 11na
	status: associated
	nd6 options=29<PERFORMNUD,IFDISABLED,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>

Best regard
